business_ideas.idea: AI dressing room for e-commerce sites to visualize clothing on customers
AI tools for real estate brokers to enhance listings and attract more buyers
Lindy bot for automating meeting prep, scheduling, social media management, and business operations

predictions.text: Within 12 months AI co-workers will exist in Slack for messaging and task execution
Within 24-36 months AI will produce 4K video people indistinguishable from humans on Zoom calls
Pausing AI and rolling out existing tech would eliminate 20% of all current jobs immediately
Software businesses will face increased competition making them less attractive long-term investments
